product.summary: AI agent governance dashboard for Microsoft 365 Copilot — monitor, audit, and enforce policies across your autonomous agents.
product.longSummary: Copilot Flight Recorder is the control tower for enterprise AI agents. It connects to Microsoft Graph API to monitor Copilot Studio agents, enforce trust policies, detect anomalies, and maintain a complete audit trail for compliance. Built for CISOs, IT admins, and compliance teams managing autonomous AI at scale.
product.description:
Copilot Flight Recorder provides real-time governance for Microsoft 365 Copilot agents:

- **Agent Inventory** — Discover and catalog all Copilot agents across your tenant
- **Trust Scoring** — Algorithmic trust scores based on event history, policy violations, and risk signals
- **Policy Engine** — Define and enforce guardrails for data access, external communication, and autonomy levels
- **Incident Management** — Severity-ranked alerts with recommended actions and case activity tracking
- **Audit Trail** — Immutable, timestamped log of every action for SOC 2 and ISO 27001 compliance
- **Graph API Sync** — Native Microsoft Graph connector for real-time data from Entra ID, Defender, and Purview
- **RBAC** — Role-based access control (admin, operator, viewer) enforced across API and UI
- **Export** — CSV and JSON compliance reports

Deploys as a single container on Azure Container Apps with SQLite persistence.

plans.summary: Up to 5 agents, 7-day event retention, single user
Unlimited agents, 90-day retention, 10 users, Teams/Slack notifications
Unlimited everything, 365-day retention, RBAC, SSO, SLA, dedicated support
